class.name: FestivalRegistry
class.brief_description: A lookup table of all authored content, keyed by resource id.
class.description: Systems resolve ids to resources through the registry, for example mapping the current outfit id to its perceived role and authority. Content can be registered by hand, bulk loaded from a directory with [method scan_directory], or imported from a Secret Census package by [FestivalCensusImporter]. Every content type follows the same method family: [code]register_*[/code], [code]get_*[/code], [code]has_*[/code] and [code]get_*_ids[/code], covering NPCs, outfits, items, knowledge, locations ([FestivalLocation]), plot hooks ([FestivalPlotHook]) and events ([FestivalEvent]). World-level metadata from an import (game info and settings) is held as a [Dictionary] via [method set_world_info] and [method get_world_info]. Registered as the [code]FestivalRegistry[/code] singleton.
